entity.summary: Gibraltar-regulated centralized cryptocurrency exchange that went live with institutional customers on November 30, 2021 and opened public trading in December 2021.
entity.notes: Official launch notices distinguish the November 30, 2021 production go-live from the December 2021 public opening. Current official and independent profiles confirm continuing operation.

expected.summary: Gibraltar-based centralized exchange launched in 2021 and still operating under the Bullish brand.

changes.summary: Gibraltar-regulated centralized cryptocurrency exchange that went live with institutional customers on November 30, 2021 and opened public trading in December 2021.
changes.notes: Official launch notices distinguish the November 30, 2021 production go-live from the December 2021 public opening. Current official and independent profiles confirm continuing operation.

events.title: Bullish exchange went live
events.description: Bullish went live with institutional customers on 2021-11-30 and opened its regulated trading platform to the public in December 2021.
events.notes: The event uses the first production go-live date; public access followed later in December.

evidence.title: Bullish goes live with institutional customers
evidence.notes: Official launch announcement for institutional customers.

evidence.title: Bullish Exchange opens regulated platform to the public
evidence.notes: Official announcement confirming the subsequent public opening.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Bullish
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the Bullish identity and current market activity.
